raw_input:
[4.0/5] Nice Roller Excited to give this jade roller a try. Packaging is cute. The large roller was detached, but is very easy to attach. No issues with it coming off (yet). The longer silver end with the jade ball is actually a spring that comes slightly greased-so be careful when handling. [4.0/5] Love it! I really liked the jade roller. I use it every night in my skincare routine and it really helps make my skin look and feel amazing! [5.0/5] Relaxing Beyond Compare First off if you’re looking for a gift for someone this is definitely a ready made gift set ready to wrap-with a beautiful sturdy box that can also be used as a place to permanently hold the set. (The box top opens on one side with a hinge and doesn’t completely come off) It’s got nice purple tissue on the inside and the tool comes in a purple velvet carrying case. There also a jade Gua Sha tool included which is a perfect nice extra touch. If you’ve never tried gua sha you simply must try it. It is the most relaxing thing ever for TMJ issues especially if you grind your teeth at night or have tightness in your shoulders or neck. You use oil and gently scrape to release tightness. It is truly amazing and relaxing-a huge relief, really helps jaw clenching reduce massively!

The tool itself jade roller is bigger than I thought it would be. It’s very pretty, well made, sturdy, heavy in the hand and I absolutely love the jade. I’m kind of a sucker for massage tools, and I did question myself if I really needed yet another one but I was super drawn to this. I am SO VERY DEFINITELY GLAD I got this one, and if you’re on the fence I hope I can give you peace of mind that this is really truly worth the plunge. First off I’ll say I enjoy very deep tissue massage, and very strong pressure. So I thought what is this little thing going to do for me really? Still, I remained drawn to to it.

I’ll just say, it is utterly one of the top things I’ve ever done for self care. Very relaxing, rejuvenating, invigorating, and lovely-so very pleasurable. I put mine in the fridge for about twenty minutes, and started rolling (you’re supposed to start from the neck and always roll upwards onto the face) The chills I got from this procedure and the delicious relaxation that followed is almost beyond words. It was also oddly energizing. An unusual thing to feel energized yet calm and relaxed for sure! I personally have been using the side with the ball/ slightly springy end is emotional freedom technique tapping gently on the meridian points. It’s very effective for me.

I will say that the jade, the coolness, the gentle rolling etc. is supposed to bring the quality of youth to you, and I certainly felt the next day after using it once that I looked and felt more relaxed, refreshed, and my face looked younger. I felt like it reduced puffiness and tightness as well.

I felt inspired to get another gua sha tool so I got a titanium one today for larger muscles and deeper work since that is also wonderful.

I highly highly recommend these tools, and also as a gift, fantastic! [5.0/5] Beautiful and have seen improvement in eye puffiness I LOVE this jade roller! It was recommended by my friend. It has definitely improved some of my eye puffiness. My husband also likes it because of the massage ball attached for pressure points. He has noticed an improvement in his shoulder tension.

The box is beautiful that it is delivered in, and it is packaged well. The ebook that is emailed once your roller is delivered is a wonderful bonus too! It helps explain why this roller is unique and how to use it.

I am very pleased with this product and very happy I purchased it. [5.0/5] Make more . Good good result. Very comfortable ,easy to use ,very helpful .Thank you [5.0/5] Well made. Packaged well. Well made. Packaged well. [5.0/5] Awesome Set, Great gift idea too! This is such a beautiful set. The jade alone is stunning. The presentation is amazing making it great to gift. It really stimulates blood flow and collagen renewal in the face. What a difference in puffiness and glow on my face. Im so loving this set! [3.0/5] Heavy to hold I have a hard time holding this Jade roller with one hand because it is very large and heavy, and I'm not a wimpy girl. I tend to use it more on my neck than my face because of its size. I keep it in the freezer and it really does wonders on the neck. I attempt to use it on my face but it's just a bit too heavy and large. The ball is of no use to me other than a few Taps on the neck/behind the lower neck. It hurts to use under my eyes. I haven't decided if I'm going to keep it yet. It came in a lovely box and the set is very cute as a gift I just think that the size is the problem for me at this point. [5.0/5] Absolutely Love This!!! Best packaging I’ve seen in a long time! The roller has a decent weight and the craftsmanship is excellent. Maybe it’s just in my mind but, I feel like it’s helping the fine lines on my forehead from wearing heavy glasses for years. [5.0/5] It’s a good jade roller Very impressed. Received my roller packaged beautifully in a purple velvet pouch. It’s much heavier than my old roller which broke on my. It comes with another cool tool and works well. I put it in the freezer for a few minutes then rub it in an upward motion bringing down inflammation and working my oils and moisturizer into my skin. [5.0/5] Large roller Great roller! It’s a bit big but can work well on more than just your face for ultimate smoothness! [4.0/5] Good stuff! Love this! The design is perfect for me. I didn’t give all 5 stars because the larger end was detached when I opened the package, it was an easy fix and still worked fine when I used it. Very cooling and very easy to use. [5.0/5] Love My Roller Love my roller. This company is wonderful to work with. Packaging is great and I enjoy the product. Thank you so much! [5.0/5] Beautiful Jade Roller! Love it! The Dr. KOKO Jade Roller was inside a purple velvet satchel and carefully packaged inside the green gift box pictured. I was pleased to find the gift set included a gua sha scraping massage tool, an informative brochure, and an eBook with beauty tips that are super helpful if this is your first time using a Jade Roller! This Jade Roller is larger than most Jade Rollers which I loved since it covers more surface area and is more functional on the ball side to roll the sensitive skin in the eye contour area. In my experience with some Jade Rollers they require you to apply significant pressure on your skin for the device to roll, can sometimes drag across the skin, and are squeaky! This Jade Roller performed like a dream and I have enjoyed incorporating it into my morning and nighttime skincare routines. After cleansing and toning I applied a hydrating toner in the morning or one of my favorite facial oils at night prior to using the Jade Roller. Then I applied gentle pressure while rolling the Jade Roller from the center of the face in upward and outward motions. I loved to put my Jade Roller in the refrigerator prior to use for an extra cooling sensation! There are many benefits to using a Jade Roller including stimulating circulation and enhancing lymphatic drainage which can decrease puffiness and under-eye circles, and even minimize the look of fine lines over time. The Jade Roller is also wonderful for working serums and oils into the skin for maximum effectiveness. The Jade Roller is easy to clean with warm soapy water. The Jade Roller would make a perfect Christmas Gift for a loved one, friend, or for yourself! I'm sure you will love it as much as I do! [5.0/5] Better than other jade rollers High quality jade roller. I bought this because it’s a Gua Sha and jade roller combination PLUS the tapping stone. If you watch the YouTube video about this product, you’ll see how easy it is to use. The roller is detachable for easy cleaning. I keep the Gua Sha and the roller part inside my little cooler in my bathroom. I wake up and use the Gua Sha with my favorite face oil. I feel like it helps the circulation on my face. Then at night, I use the jade roller after I put all my treatments as a relaxing massage. I own another jade roller, which I also bought from amazon. It works well, but dr koko jade roller is heavier and has more substance. [2.0/5] Not real jade stone It’s ok but it’s hard to used the other side of the roller it keeps bending put & pulling my hair out.and also they claim it’s aunthenic jade which is not true this is made of plastic look like jade stone, why lie about it? [5.0/5] Great for my face I love the little jade roller! it looks beautiful, I’ve been using it for probably a month and my skin is definitely smoother I feel like it’s a little bit plumper too and I’ve also noticed that when I stop using it my skin gets a little worse! [5.0/5] Nice Jade Roller This is my first jade roller and this jade roller is so nice! This roller feels like the legit jade! The design of this jade is roller is absolutely stunning with a jade roller on one side and the other side is the ball. Every time I grab this jade roller, it is always cool to the touch.
.
After one month of using this jade roller, I have seen that my skin absorbed a skincare product better. In particular, my skin under my eye looks more healthy. I especially love using this jade roller when I mask. It provides a sensational cooling effect because the jade itself is at a cold temperature.
.
On the other side, I have not seen any anti-aging results such as wrinkle reduction. I will continue to use this to look out for long term results.
.
Once again, I want to emphasize that the skin does not only reflect from what you use on the outside but what you put inside your body. There are many factors that come into play, such as life habits and diet. Although this jade roller may work for me, it may not work for someone else. In the end, it doesn’t hurt to invest in a jade roller. Just make sure it is the legit jade material because it will make a big difference! [1.0/5] Disappointed. Has a crack. Don't post reviews very often but in this case I had to because I bought this after reading all the glorious reviews. I believe I got a bad piece. The roller looks sturdy and the jade is big, however, the one I received has a crack in it. (see pictures) Planning on returning this item.

response:
Jade roller get many good reviews. Most buyers love it. Here what caveman find:

GOOD THINGS: Packaging very pretty - purple velvet pouch, sturdy green box, purple tissue inside. Box work as permanent storage. Come with gua sha tool as bonus. Also come with ebook and brochure. Roller big and heavy, cover more face area. Roll smooth, no squeak, no drag. Cool to touch, even cooler from fridge or freezer. Help with puffiness, eye bags, shoulder tension, jaw clenching, fine lines. Good for pushing oils and serums into skin. Make good gift.

BAD THINGS: Some rollers arrive with large end detached - easy fix but still happen. One buyer get cracked jade piece. One buyer say jade not real, claim it plastic. Heavy size not work for all - one buyer find too big and heavy for face, hurt under eyes. Spring end on ball side come greased, handle careful. Ball end on some buyers hard to use, bend and pull hair.

OVERALL: Most buyers happy. Skin look better, feel better. Many use every day. Recommend putting in fridge before use. Roll upward on face for best result. Good gift idea.
